payload.message: Run wallet monitor: cd /root/Dex-trading-bot && python3 wallet_watcher.py && echo '---' && cat /root/.openclaw/workspace/memory/wallets/watchlist.json

Run hourly status:

```bash
cd /root/Dex-trading-bot && bash backup.sh && python3 -c "from alert_sender import get_status; print(get_status())"
```

Send Chris balance, record, and systems status.

Run system health check:

```bash
cd /root/Dex-trading-bot && python3 integrity_monitor.py 2>&1 | grep -v ALERTS
ps aux | grep -E "gmgn_scanner|position_monitor|alert_sender" | grep python | grep -v grep | wc -l
```

Send Chris: system health status and running process count.

Run scan report and send to Telegram:

```bash
cd /root/Dex-trading-bot && bash scan_report.sh 2>&1
```

Then send the full output to Chris via Telegram.
